mermaidSyntax:
graph LR subgraph Screening["Screening Period
Weeks -4 to 0"] A[Informed Consent] --> B[Eligibility Assessment] B --> C[Baseline Measurements] end subgraph Treatment["Treatment Period
Weeks 0-52"] C --> D{Randomization
Week 0} D -->|Treatment Arm| E[Drug X 10mg Daily] D -->|Control Arm| F[Placebo] E --> G[Follow-up Visits
Weeks 4, 12, 26] F --> H[Follow-up Visits
Weeks 4, 12, 26] G --> I[Week 52 Visit
Primary Endpoint] H --> I end subgraph Extension["Extension Period
Weeks 52-104"] I --> J[Optional Open-Label Extension] end I --> K[Safety Follow-up
Week 56] style D fill:#f59e0b,stroke:#d97706,color:#000 style E fill:#3b82f6,stroke:#1e40af,color:#fff style F fill:#ef4444,stroke:#b91c1c,color:#fff style I fill:#10b981,stroke:#047857,color:#fff style J fill:#8b5cf6,stroke:#6d28d9,color:#fff style K fill:#6b7280,stroke:#4b5563,color:#fff
